changes: Layers panel — new Layers tab in right panel with thumbnail preview of each layer's tiles
Layers panel — Add/Delete buttons to dynamically create or remove layers (max 8)
Layers panel — click a layer row to switch active layer; visibility checkbox per layer
Layers panel — Up/Down arrow buttons and drag-to-reorder for changing layer draw order
Layers panel — active layer highlighted in blue; layer spinbox max updates dynamically
Play mode — walk around the level with WASD/arrow keys, full tile collision, camera follow, Shift to toggle noclip
Play mode — NPC collision using full image bounds; setshape(1,w,h) and setshape2(tw,th,{array}) override via NPC script
Play mode — link warping between levels with enter-edge detection to prevent looping
Play mode — link helper: walk to a position and press Spacebar to pin link destination using player collision center
Play mode — link helper shows rubber-band tile selection and confirm dialog (Accept/Retry/Cancel) with editable fields
Play mode — link helper disables warping through other links while active
Play mode — GS1 script parsing: setcharani, this.ani, this.head/body/shield, setcharprop (#1/#2/#3/#8/#m/#c/#n/#g/C0-C4/P0+), this.colors[], this.nick
Play mode — NPC nickname and guild displayed above character
Play mode — sitting tile detection using player collision center
Play mode — keyboard input blocked while any dialog input has focus
Play mode — debug overlay (key 2) shows NPC hitboxes, link bounds, player collision box, sitting tile highlights
Play mode — edit bypass toggle (key 3) to double-click and edit objects without exiting play mode
Player settings dialog — customize HEAD, BODY, SHIELD, SWORD, HAT, colors, and per-action ganis
Player settings dialog — animated preview canvas with pan/drag, scroll-wheel zoom, +/- buttons, 4-direction d-pad, double-click to recenter
NW parser fix — level names with spaces (e.g. 'new 2.nw') no longer corrupt link x/y/width fields; binary graal link parser patched to match
Link serialization — empty nextLevel writes as '-' placeholder to keep token count valid on reload
.graal and .zelda binary format support — open, view, and save classic Graal/Zelda Online levels
Zelda format enforces object restrictions — NPC and Chest placement blocked for .zelda tabs
Binary tile RLE decoder with LSB-first bitstream (12-bit V0/V1, 13-bit V2/V3)
Sign text decoded/encoded using classic Graal character table and control code sequences
this.ani = "name" as alternative to setcharani()
Fixed GANI body sprite — first sprite per direction line was hardcoded to sprite 0
GANI inline image sprite types (e.g. unbomber_shadow.png) now render correctly
Working dir rescan clears GANI cache so custom ganis load properly after scan
this.colors[] now only recolors explicitly set slots — unset slots keep original body pixel colors
Tileset switching now works for all images in fileCache (not just file-picker uploads)
Tileset persists when switching tabs — levels with default tileset inherit the combo selection
Tab bar scrolls horizontally instead of wrapping to multiple rows
Newly loaded levels correctly show as active tab without requiring manual click
loadDefaultTileset no longer overwrites custom tilesets on already-open tabs
pics1.gif added to default tileset combo list
NPC showcharacter/showcharacter() renders idle.gani character in the level
setcharani support — GS1 (setcharani gani,) and GS2 (setCharAni("gani", null)) both parsed
this.head/body/shield overrides gani defaults if file is in working dir cache
this.colors[0-4] recolors BODY sprites using Graal palette
no-shield.png / no-head.png / no-body.png skip rendering that sprite layer
Missing gani falls back to idle.gani
Screenshot excludes NPC placeholders, selection highlight, signs, and links
Escape key closes any open dialog
Working dir scan batched (64 parallel) with UI yield between batches — no freeze on large folders
NPC list double-click opens editor without text selection race condition
Color scheme palette button added to toolbar next to working dir
GS1/GS2 syntax checker in NPC editor — flags unclosed strings, block comments, mismatched braces/parens/brackets, and missing parentheses on if/while/for/function
Layer visibility toggles in View menu — show/hide Layer 1, 2, 3 independently
Tile selection copy/paste: right-click selection to clone as stamp, Ctrl+C to copy, Ctrl+V to paste
Delete key on tile selection erases the selected area
NPC click priority over links — clicking a tile with both an NPC and a link always selects the NPC
Fixed link resize handles misfiring at low zoom levels
Fixed NPC hit detection for fractional tile positions loaded from .nw files
Save level now uses the tab name as the filename (e.g. mymap.nw instead of always level.nw)
Save As prompts to rename the level and downloads with the new name
Right-click a tab to rename, save as, or close it
GMAP save dialog — choose Save All or Save Changed, downloads a ZIP with all sub-levels + the .gmap file
Save As icon updated to layered double-disc SVG
Tile Objects now includes all 5 groups: Standard, Castle, House Inside, Snow, Volcano
Fixed: chest editor sometimes not opening on double-click
Undo/redo now covers NPC, link, sign, and chest add/delete — full object state including scripts is preserved
Double-clicking an NPC in the NPC list opens its script editor
Link resize anchors fixed — hit detection now matches rendered handle positions exactly
Tiles button removed from Built-In Objects panel
Edit Links and Edit Signs now open popup dialogs matching C++ TilesEditor — table of all links/signs with Edit, Delete, Create, and Close actions
Add Link and Add Sign buttons now use the active tile selection for position and size; disabled when no selection is active
Add Link places a link at selection bounds with matching width and height
Add Sign places a sign at selection top-left (always standard 2×1 tile size)
Add Link and Add Sign icons updated — composite link+plus and sign+plus SVGs
Tile stamp now places on click — no longer requires dragging to paint
Load Tileset button adds the loaded file to the tileset combo list and selects it
Delete button hidden for built-in tile objects
Clicking and dragging an NPC/object now works on first click without prior selection
Object selection pink overlay matching C++ TilesEditor
Drag-to-place objects from panel instead of click-to-place
Tile stamp only paints when dragging, not on single click
Right-click cancels active tile selection
Mousewheel zooms without requiring Ctrl
Working dir chest/baddy/npc images shown in level
Grid color changed to gray for better contrast
Sign/link transparent fill overlay added
Delete key removes selected object
Multi-tab session persistence — all open tabs restored on page reload
Monaco NPC script editor with GraalScript LSP
Flip H/V and rotate tile selection
About dialog with changelog tab
Status bar shows 'Tile: empty' for unmodified tiles — new levels no longer pre-fill with tile 0
Toolbar icons for Miscellaneous Functions, Screenshot, and Selection Filter buttons
